behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is service↔persistence handoff: summary write must query stored per-dimension findings for the same round before allowing PASS. MOCK-MISS applies to module interaction, not just one pure function. Rejected System because behavior text is only about "stored ... finding" and summary storage, with no required real OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because correctness does not depend on model output quality or multi-agent sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run summary-save flow with a real local repository/DB fixture containing one FAIL dimension finding for that round; assert PASS summary write is rejected and persisted state remains non-PASS.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: This is about gate module wiring to storage reads versus summary text input; real failure appears when modules interact and gate chooses wrong source of truth. Rejected System: behavior text says "reads ... stored findings" and does not require real network/OS/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no dependence on model judgment, only deterministic data-source selection.
behaviors.test_description: Seed storage with FAIL finding and conflicting manual summary text saying PASS; execute stop-gate computation path and assert verdict is FAIL/escalate based on stored findings.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Behavior spans request handling, authorization/flag validation, and audit persistence. A pure unit test of one validator can miss missing-audit or missing-flag enforcement at integration points. Rejected System because text requires "auditable warning record" but not real external logging infra. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model-output correctness dependency.
behaviors.test_description: Invoke manual-summary override flow twice: without override flag (must reject), and with override flag (must allow and persist warning/audit record linked to round/user). Verify both persisted outcomes.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: REAL-INFRA risk is commit ordering/identity from real VCS state (often via git subprocess) plus gate checks. In-process fakes can hide ancestry/timestamp/HEAD mismatches. Rejected Workflow because behavior requires one freshness relation (latest fix commit vs review-round id), not multi-agent chain quality. Rejected Agentic because assertion is commit/round provenance, not model output content.
behaviors.test_description: In a real temporary git repo, create fix commit(s), then attempt PASS with an older review-round id and with a post-fix review-round id. Assert older id is rejected and post-fix id is accepted by gate finalization.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real "review-agent round" in the live loop; mocking the agent can falsely satisfy freshness without proving real run execution on updated diff. Per LLM-DEP guidance, path includes real model call and handoff correctness depends on that step occurring. Rejected Workflow because this behavior is a single required agentic round gate, not multiple agentic decisions chained for correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end live loop against real model-backed review agent: update diff, attempt PASS before rerun (must fail), run new review-agent round on updated diff, then re-attempt PASS (may proceed subject to findings).

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: Deterministic policy over stored results + round counters across modules (round manager, findings store, gate). Unit-only check can miss state handoff bugs. Rejected System because behavior is based on "stored results" and exhaustion state, not real OS/network/subprocess effects. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because unresolved MUST-FIX is already in persisted findings; test need not validate model quality.
behaviors.test_description: Seed local store with unresolved MUST-FIX findings and set rounds-used == rounds-limit; execute final decision path and assert escalation outcome with PASS blocked.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a live multi-round sequence; correctness depends on chained stage handoffs across rounds and final gate decision/emission. MULTI-STEP is directly satisfied. Rejected Agentic as too low because one-step agent call cannot expose failures in cross-round state carryover/exhaustion logic described by "multi-round review workflow".
behaviors.test_description: Execute full live pipeline across multiple real review rounds until limit is reached, preserve unresolved MUST-FIX findings, then verify finalization blocks PASS and emits escalation event/record at workflow end.
